column1: Accounts Receivable Tracker - Business System Package
Track all outstanding invoices. Update payment dates as received.
Red = 60+ days past due - COLLECTION ACTION NEEDED
Late Fee: 1.5% per month on balances over 30 days
Lien Rights: Preserve by sending preliminary notice within [state deadline]
5. Notice of Intent to Lien (90 days)
- Send preliminary notice on every job (even if not required)
- Invoice promptly (within 5 days of completing work)
- Require partial payment upfront for new clients
- Get personal guarantee from small business owners
- Stop work if payment is significantly late
